experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer (Adobe Extensions)
bullets: Architected a <<Node.js>> sidecar process to handle <<AI inference>> outside Adobe's sandboxed CEP runtime, enabling scalable <<microservices>> communication via local HTTP <<API>> for real-time results.
Designed and built <<REST APIs>> and background services for <<ONNX>> model inference, implementing <<event-driven>> patterns to decouple frontend UI from backend processing.
Implemented <<caching>> strategies and <<async>> processing pipelines to optimize performance of <<AI-powered>> tools across production Adobe extensions.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer
bullets: Designed and built <<REST APIs>> using <<Node.js>> and <<Express.js>> with <<TypeORM>> for type-safe <<PostgreSQL>> access, delivering scalable backend services for a tourism booking platform.
Optimized <<database>> performance using <<PostgreSQL>> indexing strategies and <<EXPLAIN ANALYZE>> to achieve sub-100ms <<API>> response times under concurrent load.
Implemented secure payment <<API>> integration with idempotent transaction handling and webhook verification, reducing checkout friction by 40%.

experience.title: Backend Engineer
bullets: Designed and deployed a distributed, <<event-driven>> log ingestion pipeline on <<AWS ECS Fargate>> using <<BullMQ>> for <<job queuing>>, <<Redis>> for <<caching>> and rate limiting, and <<PostgreSQL>> (pgvector) for similarity search — processing 1M+ events/hour with sub-second latency.

Implemented robust <<async>> processing patterns: producer-consumer queues for log normalization, <<worker pools>> with configurable concurrency, and <<priority queues>> for urgent events vs. batch backfill jobs.
Built <<dead-letter queues>> (<<DLQs>>) with retry policies (exponential backoff, max attempts) to handle malformed or failing log entries without pipeline blockage.
Designed <<idempotent>> event processing using <<Redis>>-backed dedup keys and at-least-once delivery semantics through BullQueue's job completion callbacks.
Reduced <<ONNX>> embedding time from 20+ minutes to under 1 minute via batch processing, <<Redis>> caching, and <<worker autoscaling>>.
Set up full <<CI/CD>> with <<GitHub Actions>> OIDC, <<ECR>>, <<SSM Parameter Store>>, <<RDS PostgreSQL>>, and <<ElastiCache>>.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer
bullets: Designed and implemented <<REST APIs>> using <<Node.js>> and <<Express.js>> for a full-stack CRM handling diagnoses, prescriptions, and patient records.
Implemented <<JWT>> auth with access/refresh token rotation and <<RBAC>> across three permission levels, securing backend <<API>> endpoints.
Optimized <<database>> queries for 10K+ monthly records using composite indexes and <<PostgreSQL>> window functions.

education.degree: Complete SQL Databases Bootcamp: Zero to Mastery
Master the Coding Interview: Data Structures & Algorithms

projects.name: RootCluster — AI-Powered Log Analysis Platform
projects.techStack: Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL (pgvector), Redis, BullMQ, ONNX, AWS ECS Fargate, Docker, GitHub Actions
highlights: Designed and deployed a distributed, <<event-driven>> log ingestion pipeline on <<AWS ECS Fargate>> using <<BullMQ>> for <<job queuing>>, <<Redis>> for <<caching>> and rate limiting, and <<PostgreSQL>> (pgvector) for similarity search — processing 1M+ events/hour with sub-second latency.

Implemented robust <<async>> processing patterns: producer-consumer queues for log normalization, <<worker pools>> with configurable concurrency, and <<priority queues>> for urgent events vs. batch backfill jobs.
Built <<dead-letter queues>> (<<DLQs>>) with retry policies (exponential backoff, max attempts) to handle malformed or failing log entries without pipeline blockage.
Designed <<idempotent>> event processing using <<Redis>>-backed dedup keys and at-least-once delivery semantics through BullQueue's job completion callbacks.
Reduced <<ONNX>> embedding time from 20+ minutes to under 1 minute via batch processing, <<Redis>> caching, and <<worker autoscaling>>.
Implemented centroid-based <<pgvector>> clustering to unify cross-service failures into single root causes.
Set up full <<CI/CD>> with <<GitHub Actions>> OIDC, <<ECR>>, <<SSM Parameter Store>>, <<RDS PostgreSQL>>, and <<ElastiCache>>.

projects.name: Medical CRM — AI-Enhanced Prescription Platform
highlights: Built full-stack CRM handling diagnoses, prescriptions, and patient records.
Implemented <<JWT>> auth with access/refresh token rotation and <<RBAC>> across three permission levels.
Designed drug interaction validation across 500+ medications using graph-based <<PostgreSQL>> lookup.
Optimized dashboard queries for 10K+ monthly records using composite indexes and window functions.
